generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired FEMA coordinator, I've seen firsthand how underfunded civil defense programs leave communities vulnerable. We can't afford to cut preparedness budgets when threats are evolving daily. Every dollar invested in local resilience saves lives when crises hit. Trust the experts who've been on the ground - this isn't about politics, it's about protecting families. #CommunitySafetyFirst
